Admissions

Your path into AI School.

A clear admissions process helps students and families choose the right track and start with confidence.

Personalized guidance from the start.

We do not want students placed randomly. The admissions process helps identify goals, readiness, interests, and the right learning pathway.

Contact Admissions

Application checklist

  • Student information
  • Academic records
  • Interest statement
  • Interview or consultation

Application steps

Use this as a simple visual roadmap for families.

Speak with our admissions team about academic goals, program fit, and whether AI School is the right pathway.

Submit the application form with academic background, interests, and any relevant student work or project samples.

Provide school records or transcripts so the team can understand academic readiness and placement needs.

Meet with the team to discuss motivation, learning habits, technology interests, and future goals.

Receive the admissions decision with recommended track, next steps, and onboarding details.

Join orientation, set up learning tools, meet mentors, and begin the program.

AI School

A future-ready education branch for artificial intelligence, online learning, innovation, and student portfolio development.
